back: Testing individual functions or methods in isolation. Tests should be small, fast, and independent.
Python testing framework. Write test functions starting with test_. Run with 'pytest' command.
Built-in testing framework. Create TestCase classes with setUp() and test methods. Run with unittest.main()
Statement that checks if condition is true. assert condition, 'error message'. If false, raises AssertionError.
Replacing real objects with test objects. from unittest.mock import Mock. Useful for external dependencies.
Percentage of code executed during tests. Use coverage.py package. Aim for high coverage. pytest --cov
Process of finding and fixing errors. Techniques: print statements, logging, debugger, code inspection
Built-in debugger. Set breakpoint with import pdb; pdb.set_trace(). Step through code interactively.
l (list), n (next), s (step into), c (continue), b (breakpoint), w (where), p (print variable)
Better than print for debugging. import logging. Levels: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL
logging.basicConfig(). logging.debug(), logging.info(), logging.error(). Configurable levels and format.
Measuring program performance. cProfile module shows where time is spent. Helps optimize slow code.
Static code analysis for style and error detection. Tools: pylint, flake8, black. Catches bugs early.
Write tests before code. Red-Green-Refactor cycle: fail, pass, improve. Ensures testable code.
